# Rectangle with angled stalls under the abstract-grid stamp phase.
# Exercises the stall-angle compensation in AbstractFrame::dx.

polygon outer
0,0
200,0
200,150
0,150
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set stall_angle_deg=45
----
set stall_angle_deg=45

debug use_abstract_stamp=true
----
debug use_abstract_stamp=true

generate
----
total_stalls: 120

screenshot
----
